title: Basic JavaScript Timers and Intervals
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Timers and Intervals. Focus on implementing setTimeout (delay and cancel) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Timers and Intervals
description: Create a function that uses setTimeout (delay and cancel) and setInterval (repeated execution) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Timers and Intervals Project
description: Build a small application that applies setTimeout (delay and cancel), setInterval (repeated execution), clearTimeout and clearInterval in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Timers and Intervals
description: The following code has bugs related to setTimeout (delay and cancel). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Timers and Intervals
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with setTimeout (delay and cancel) and setInterval (repeated execution).
